observations.note: Phase Marker Protocol successfully implements 3 enforcement mechanisms (pre-flight Glob, CHECKPOINT MANDATORY, exit marker Write) across all 7 release phases, mirroring proven QA skill pattern
Test suite covers all 6 acceptance criteria with 19 specific tests (100% AC coverage), all passing
Robust stale marker cleanup strategy in Phase 1 pre-flight prevents corrupted state propagation with user confirmation flow (AskUserQuestion pattern)
Consider centralizing marker file format documentation (phase, status, reason, timestamp fields) in skill header for easier reference and future maintenance
Test grep pattern for AC#4 skip detection could use word boundaries (reason: \b(skipped|not applicable|N/A)\b) to prevent future false positives
Security review passed: marker files contain no hardcoded secrets, credentials, or sensitive data that shouldn't be in git
Standards compliance verified: no Bash for file ops, proper component sizing, no language-specific code, all context files respected
Dual-path architecture maintained: src/ and .claude/ skill files kept in sync per project specifications

metadata.merge_recommendation: APPROVED - Ready for commit and QA
